{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":28},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594290347335549721","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前为止看到的这部高分作品，文字还是不错，不过感觉铺垫有点长，期待渐入佳境。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768189952,"group_id":"7568007157967227966","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9/uxFIBo5Km/ISUzrk3FUk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/24473d9abea04476ae98312cb1e0942e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795564&x-signature=IydUBqnpt4TDeGRmNqw%2BbieG%2B5Y%3D","user_id":"111605140719","user_name":"阴谋诡计的李守郭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111605140719","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7568007157967227966","book_info":{"abstract":"1939年的哈尔滨，是一座巨大的谍影迷宫。冷面王牌特工周瑾瑜，与新人顾婉茹，奉命伪装成夫妻，打入日伪权力核心。从地狱开局的身份危机，到生死相依的绝对信任，他们在清水一郎如影随形的怀疑下，如履薄冰。
当“影子协议”的谜云笼罩，“清除名单”上赫然出现自己的名字，周瑾瑜才发现，最致命的子弹来自背后。在忠诚与背叛的试炼中，他们从搭档升华为同志，以彼此为信仰的支点，化身沉默的丰碑，只为在黎明前，为这个民族盗取最后的火光。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/29abe3aef6235f6c93d19dfe6b1a47f7","author":"楼下茶馆","author_id":"","book_id":"7568007157967227966","book_name":"谍战：哈尔滨1941","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7154人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":518,"name":"特工","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=518&name=特工&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":507,"name":"谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=507&name=谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7568007572574192190","read_count":"7154","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1052125"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"359","tags":"抗战谍战,都市,特工,谍战","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o91b74a19ff40c513d67d4cfc14eda5e8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434617&x-signature=WUJD1GeedepQBWaAgrphmavHihY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3702756475680947","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"41"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":150,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3909,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":261},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1768190643,"author_reply_time":1768899157,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},
